mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 7.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in housing starts (HOUST) and retail sales (RSAFS) indicate weak demand fundamentals, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint decline in HOUST and RSAFS fails to predict negative returns in > 70% of cases over 3-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 100 signals robust supply chain activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to predict positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflationary pressure (CPIAUCSL above 2.5%) triggers central bank tightening expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS above 150k) signals a tightening labor market, increasing corporate pricing power and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to predict positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in GDP growth (GDPC1 above 2%) following a contraction signals economic recovery, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth fails to predict positive 60d returns in > 50% of cases over 3-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production (INDPRO below 99.5) indicates weakening supply-side dynamics, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO decline fails to predict negative 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances.
